title: Arcane: Behind Bars
description: Arcane: Behind Bars is a project all about bringing the awesome weapons and tools from Arcane to life! (Hopefully)
body:
**DISCONTINUED!!!**
**Check the Curseforge for the reason!**

Arcane: Behind Bars hopes to bring the world of Arcane into Minecraft, to introduce powerful weapons, tools, and materials inspired by Arcane. Explore the potential of Hextech and Shimmer, craft legendary items, and uncover new resources hidden deep underground.

**Features:**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Rio Flower & Rio Leaf: Unique plant-based resources from Arcane
 
- Malleable Shimmer & Processed Shimmer:
Experience the transformative power of Shimmer

- Hextech Ore & Deepslate Hextech Ore:
Mine valuable materials to craft powerful items

- Hextech Tools:
Craft hightech gear using Hextech Crystals

- Syringes: Utilize mysterious substances with unique effects

- Music Discs: Discover tracks inspired by Arcane

</details>

For crafting recipes and details, I’d recommend using the Just Enough Items (JEI) mod and if you have any problems/ questions please contact me.

**Credits:**
Mod Developer:
GoofyTurtleGuy

**Textures:**
GoofyTurtleGuy

**Assets & Sound Design:**
Riot Games (Arcane)

**Feedback & Support**

Have suggestions or found a bug? Contact me at arcanebehindbarsdev@gmail.com

**Note: This is a fan-made mod and is not affiliated with Mojang, Microsoft, or Riot Games.**
